scripts.render:terminal-gif: npm run render:terminal-mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i out/terminal-preview.mp4 -vf "fps=10,scale=960:-1:flags=lanczos,eq=brightness=0.03:contrast=1.08:gamma=1.14:saturation=1.12,split[s0][s1];[s0]palettegen=reserve_transparent=0[p];[s1][p]paletteuse=dither=sierra2_4a" assets/terminal-preview.gif
